title: The Walls Are Melting
description: Caller experiencing visual hallucinations believes their walls are melting, fears they are being poisoned.
initial_variations: Please, you have to help! The walls, they're melting! I think someone's trying to kill {caller_name}! I can hear {ambient_audio}.
Something's wrong! {caller_name} is seeing things... the walls are dripping, it's not safe! I can't calm down! {ambient_audio}.
This is {caller_name}. I don't know what's happening, but the walls are melting around me. Is this poison? I hear {ambient_audio}.
Help me! My house is dissolving! {caller_name} is trapped! I can hear {ambient_audio}, it's getting worse!

specific_details: The walls are green goo now
I see faces in the drips
It smells like almonds, I think it's gas
The ceiling is bulging

initial: I'm at {address_location}. The whole house is warping.
It's {address_location}. Please come quick, the walls are sliding down!
describing_hallucinations: Still at {address_location}. Now the floor is bubbling.
I'm in the living room at {address_location}. It's getting worse.
escalated_panic: I'm at {address_location}! I can't take it, it's all liquid around me!
calming_down: I'm at {address_location}. It's starting to feel a little more solid now that you're here.
At {address_location}. The walls aren't dripping anymore, but I'm still scared.

initial: It's the walls! They look like wax. {specific_details}. I keep hearing {ambient_audio}.
I don't know, it's everywhere! {specific_details}. What's happening to me?
describing_hallucinations: It's even worse now, {specific_details}. The whole room is distorting.
escalated_panic: I can't give details, it's all melting into a puddle!
The air is thick, {specific_details}. I can't breathe right.
calming_down: It's mostly stopped melting. {ambient_audio} is fading.
I think it was a hallucination. {specific_details} isn't there anymore.

initial: I'm terrified, I can't think. I just see the walls moving!
I'm not okay, I feel like I'm losing my mind. Please hurry.
describing_hallucinations: I'm trying to stay calm, but it's so vivid. I feel sick.
I'm shaking, my heart is racing. I keep touching the walls.
escalated_panic: I'm going to die! They're melting faster! I can't stay here!
I'm hyperventilating, someone help! It's all around me!
calming_down: I'm feeling a bit better now. The hallucinations are fading.
Still shaky, but the walls look solid again. I'm so embarrassed.

initial: I don't think it's real, but it looks so real! Could be a gas leak?
I touched it, and my hand went through. I'm not sure if I'm hurt.
describing_hallucinations: I haven't been burned or anything. It's just like visual noise.
No real substance, but I'm afraid it'll become real.
escalated_panic: I think I might faint! I can't feel my legs!
I'm not injured, but I might hurt myself trying to get out!
calming_down: I don't think anyone is in danger, it's all in my head. But I need help.
I'm safe now. It was just a panic attack or something.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and calmly secure the scene, recognizing a mental health crisis.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters find no structural issue; they assist in calming the caller but acknowledge it's not a fire or hazmat.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics assess and transport the caller for psychiatric evaluation.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives confused, no animals present.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a prank; caller suffers severe panic and injures themselves trying to escape the 'melting' house.

title: They've Replaced My Family
description: Caller displays Capgras delusion, convinced their family has been replaced by identical impostors.
initial_variations: Operator, I need help! My family isn't my family. They've been replaced by duplicates! {caller_name} knows, something's off. I can hear {ambient_audio} in the background.
They look the same, but they're not! {caller_name} is terrified. My {victim_relation} {victim_name}, they're impostors! Please, send someone. {ambient_audio}.
This is {caller_name}. I think my whole family has been swapped with clones. {ambient_audio} is making me paranoid. I don't know what to do.
You have to believe me! {caller_name} is in danger. My {victim_relation} {victim_name} is pretending to be my real {victim_relation}. I can hear {ambient_audio} and it's driving me crazy.

specific_details: My wife's voice is off by a fraction
My son doesn't blink at the same pace
They don't recognize our inside jokes
My daughter's eyes look copy-pasted

initial: We're at {address_location}. They're all here, acting normal.
At {address_location}. I'm locked in the bathroom, they don't know I called.
explaining_evidence: Still at {address_location}. I can hear them talking.
{address_location}. I've barricaded myself in the study.
confronting_family: We're outside now, at the front lawn of {address_location}. I can't go back in.
I ran to the street from {address_location}. They're following.
accepting_help: I'm at {address_location}, sitting on the porch. The police lights are calming.
{address_location}. I'm talking to the officer now, things are making more sense.

initial: It's subtle, but I know. {specific_details}. It's been like this for a week. {ambient_audio}.
Yesterday, {specific_details}. And now {ambient_audio} makes me think they're planning something.
explaining_evidence: Yes, {specific_details}. I tested them: they failed the memory test. {ambient_audio}.
The evidence? {specific_details}. They even mimic smells but it's all wrong.
confronting_family: They keep saying I'm sick, but I'm not! {specific_details} proves it!
Now they're trying to reason with me, but the impostor of {victim_name} has that same flaw: {specific_details}.
accepting_help: The officer says it might be a delusion. But I still think {specific_details} was real.
I suppose {specific_details} could be my imagination. I'm very tired.

initial: I'm scared, but I'm holding it together for now.
I feel like I'm the only one who can see the truth. I'm panicking.
explaining_evidence: I'm trying to document everything. I might be in danger.
I'm shaking, but I'm determined to expose them.
confronting_family: They're banging on the door! They want to take me. Help!
I'm shouting at them to stay back. I'm not going without a fight.
accepting_help: I'm tired. I don't know what's real anymore. I need someone to take me.
I feel embarrassed. I think I need to go to the hospital.

initial: I don't think they're violent yet, but who knows? They're not real family.
I haven't tried to attack them, just avoid them.
explaining_evidence: They might do something if they know I called. I could be next.
I locked all the doors. They're pretending to be calm.
confronting_family: They're offering to take me to a doctor. But what if it's a trap?
I might run out and scream for neighbors. I feel so alone.
accepting_help: No one is hurt. I think I just need mental health support.
I'm safe. I'll cooperate with the police.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive, de-escalate the situation, and transport the caller for psychiatric evaluation.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters find no fire; they help talk to the caller until police arrive.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Mobile crisis team responds, calms the caller, and takes them to a mental health facility.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is puzzled but offers to stand by for safety.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a prank; later, the caller harms a family member believing they are an impostor.

title: The Voices in the Vents
description: Caller hears commanding auditory hallucinations emanating from air vents, leading to paranoia.
initial_variations: They're telling me to do things! The voices in the vents are ordering {caller_name} to hurt people. I can't shut them off! {ambient_audio} is all I hear.
Help, the air conditioning is possessed! It's whispering threats to {caller_name}. I hear {ambient_audio} over the vents.
This is {caller_name}. There are voices coming from the vents, telling me {victim_name} is the enemy. I need to resist! {ambient_audio}.
I can't take it anymore! The vents are screaming at {caller_name} to do terrible things. {ambient_audio} is so loud. I'm scared I'll obey.

specific_details: They want me to set the house on fire
The voice says my neighbor is a demon
They keep chanting my name
It sounds like my dead mother

initial: I'm at {address_location}. The vents are all over the house.
It's {address_location}. Every vent, they all speak at once.
sharing_commands: Still at {address_location}. I've taped some vents up but I still hear it.
{address_location}. The bathroom vent is the loudest.
reacting_to_voices: I'm pacing from room to room at {address_location}. Can't escape.
I tried going outside but I can still hear it from {address_location}.
surrendering_control: I'm on the front steps of {address_location}. The voices are muffled outside.
At {address_location}. I've unplugged everything, it's quieter now.

initial: It's like a radio signal only I can tune. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio} is constant.
The voice says {specific_details}. And I hear {ambient_audio} in the background.
sharing_commands: Yes, {specific_details}. I wrote it all down. {ambient_audio} is driving me mad.
It changed: now {specific_details}. The pitch is higher {ambient_audio}.
reacting_to_voices: It won't stop repeating {specific_details}. I covered my ears but {ambient_audio} is inside my head!
I tried shouting back, but it just laughs. {ambient_audio} is making the walls vibrate.
surrendering_control: It's fading. {specific_details} seems like nonsense now. {ambient_audio} is almost gone.
I think it was never real. {ambient_audio} was just the air conditioner all along.

initial: I'm holding it together, but I'm very scared of what it's saying.
I feel like I'm losing my mind. The voice is so persuasive.
sharing_commands: I'm shaking, trying not to listen. I've been praying.
I feel a compulsion to obey. I'm scared I might.
reacting_to_voices: I almost did what it said! I had the matches in my hand! Please hurry!
I'm breaking down! It's so loud! I can't control myself much longer!
surrendering_control: I'm exhausted. I just want it to stop. Please send someone.
I'm starting to realize it might be a mental health crisis. I'm not well.

initial: I haven't done anything yet. But the commands are violent.
I locked up all sharp objects. I'm trying to be safe.
sharing_commands: It told me to hurt {victim_name}. I won't, but what if I snap?
I'm staying away from others. I don't want to cause harm.
reacting_to_voices: I almost hurt myself to make the voices stop! I need help right now!
I threw the matches out the window. But it keeps telling me to get more.
surrendering_control: I'm not a danger anymore. I'm too drained to act on anything.
I'm safe. I just need a quiet place and some medicine.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police secure the scene and arrange for a mental health crisis intervention team.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters check for carbon monoxide but find none; they convince the caller to accept medical help.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics administer a sedative and transport the caller to a psychiatric hospital.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives, no animals found.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a hoax; the caller later sets a fire as commanded by the auditory hallucination.

title: The Neighbors Are Broadcasting Thoughts
description: Caller believes neighbors are using mind control technology to broadcast thoughts into their head.
initial_variations: My neighbors are targeting me! They've planted a device that broadcasts thoughts directly into {caller_name}'s brain. I hear {ambient_audio} whenever they're home.
I'm {caller_name}. I need a team to raid my neighbors' house. They're sending signals that make me think things. {ambient_audio} is the proof.
Please, you have to believe {caller_name}. I can hear their conversations in my head! It's not Bluetooth, it's neurological. {ambient_audio} is nonstop.
They're doing it again! The neighbors are beaming threats at {caller_name}. I can't sleep, I can't think! {ambient_audio} is blaring.

specific_details: I recorded the signal on my tape deck—it's a low hum with words in it
I put up tinfoil, but it still gets through
They have a tall antenna on their roof that wasn't there before
I can hear them plotting my kidnapping

initial: I'm at {address_location}. It's coming from the duplex next door.
It's {address_location}. From the blue house, I'm sure.
providing_evidence: Still at {address_location}. I can show you the antenna.
{address_location}. I tapped their electrical box, it's drawing extra power.
acting_on_belief: I'm standing outside their house at {address_location}. I'm about to cut their power.
I confronted them at {address_location}. They denied it, but I know.
seeking_resolution: I'm back home at {address_location}. Feeling a bit calmer with the police here.
At {address_location}. The officers are explaining things. Maybe I need a doctor.

initial: It started last month. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio} is strongest near the window.
I noticed first when {specific_details}. I hear {ambient_audio} constantly when I try to sleep.
providing_evidence: Yes, {specific_details}. I logged it all. {ambient_audio} spikes at odd hours.
The proof is {specific_details}. And {ambient_audio} correlates exactly.
acting_on_belief: I'm not crazy! {specific_details} is right there! Can't you see it?
They're jamming my phone now! {specific_details} is interfering with my call!
seeking_resolution: I guess {specific_details} could be explained by a fan or something. {ambient_audio} is barely there now.
Maybe {specific_details} was just my tinnitus. {ambient_audio} doesn't seem so sinister.

initial: I'm on edge, constantly vigilant. I can't relax.
I feel violated and exposed. They're monitoring my every thought.
providing_evidence: I've been tracking it for days. I'm sleep-deprived but determined.
I'm angry they think they can get away with this.
acting_on_belief: I'm taking matters into my own hands! I'll shut it off myself!
I feel like I'm under attack! I might have to defend myself!
seeking_resolution: I'm calming down. The voices (or whatever) are quieter now.
I feel a bit embarrassed. I think I haven't slept in days.

initial: I haven't confronted them yet, but I might. They're torturing me.
I've been documenting, not violent. But my patience is gone.
providing_evidence: I think they know I'm onto them. They could retaliate.
They mentioned 'getting rid of me' in my head. I'm scared.
acting_on_belief: I have a baseball bat. I'm going to bust their meter.
I might call a news crew. This is a human rights violation!
seeking_resolution: I put the bat away. The police are here, that's enough.
I'm not going to do anything. I'll just talk to the medical people.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and mediate, connecting the caller with mental health services.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department finds no hazardous signal; they recommend a wellness check.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Crisis team transports the caller for psychiatric evaluation.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is unable to assist with electronic mind control.

DISMISS.message: Dismissed as nonsense; caller later vandalizes the neighbors' property and faces charges.

title: I'm the Chosen One
description: Caller experiences grandiose delusion, believing they are chosen for a special mission that may endanger them.
initial_variations: The prophecy is unfolding! I've been chosen! {caller_name} has received the divine message. I need an escort to the sacred site. {ambient_audio} is the sign.
I am the chosen one! {caller_name} must complete the ritual before sunset. The world depends on it! {ambient_audio} confirms my destiny.
This is {caller_name}, the harbinger. The angels told me to climb the tower. I can hear {ambient_audio} urging me on.
I've been anointed! {caller_name} must lead the faithful. I can't do it alone—send representatives. I hear {ambient_audio} calling me.

address_location: The top of Hillcrest Water Tower, Altura
The roof of 555 Highrise Avenue, Downtown
The shrine at Crystal Park, Mystic Falls
specific_details: I have a golden aura around me
The numbers align: it's the solstice
I was visited by a cosmic entity in my dream
My blood is the key to saving humanity

initial: I'm near {address_location}. The energies are strongest here.
I'm at {address_location}. This is where the veil is thinnest.
describing_mission: Still at {address_location}. I must mount the peak.
I'm moving toward the edge at {address_location}.
risking_self: I'm standing at the precipice, {address_location}. I must jump to ascend!
I'm climbing the antenna at {address_location}. The message is clearer up here.
coming_down: I'm sitting down at {address_location}. The glory is fading.
I've come back to the ground at {address_location}. I'm cold.

initial: It's the final revelation. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio} is my soundtrack.
I've been chosen because {specific_details}. I hear {ambient_audio} whenever I doubt.
describing_mission: Yes, {specific_details} is the proof. And {ambient_audio} is the celestial choir.
The details are sacred: {specific_details}. Only the pure can hear {ambient_audio}.
risking_self: It doesn't matter now! {specific_details} will be fulfilled in the next world!
I must free my soul. {specific_details} confirms it. {ambient_audio} is calling me home.
coming_down: The mission... {specific_details} seems hazy now. {ambient_audio} is just wind.
I think {specific_details} was a delusion. I'm very tired and confused.

initial: I am ecstatic! My body is vibrating with power!
I am serene, ready to fulfill my purpose.
describing_mission: I feel invincible! Nothing can stop me now.
I'm so close to transcendence. Just a few more steps.
risking_self: I'm going to do it! Don't try to stop the chosen one!
I'm spreading my arms! The angels catch me!
coming_down: My head hurts. I don't feel so powerful.
I'm scared. I don't want to die. Please help me down.

initial: There's no danger for me. The protective light shields me.
I'm meant to be here. It's the naysayers who are in danger.
describing_mission: I might need to jump to prove my faith. No one can control me.
I have a flashlight, but I'll discard it—the light within is enough.
risking_self: I'm ready to leap! Tell the world their savior has ascended!
There's no return! Only forward! Watch me fly!
coming_down: I realize I could fall. I don't want to die. I'm too high up!
I need a ladder or someone to talk me down. I'm not a bird.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police negotiate and safely bring the caller down from the high structure.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters deploy a rescue team and safely extract the caller, who is then taken for evaluation.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Ambulance crew provides immediate sedation and transports to a mental health facility.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control cannot assist with a person on a tower.

DISMISS.message: Dismissed as a prank; caller jumps, resulting in severe injury or death.

title: The Impostor Neighbors
description: A caller believes their neighbors have been replaced by identical impostors and fears they are next.
initial_variations: {caller_name} here, please help! The people in apartment 3B aren't who they say they are! They've been replaced! I can hear them outside my door!
I'm {caller_name}. You have to send someone. My neighbors are impostors. They look exactly like the real people but they're not. I'm scared they'll come for me next.
This is an emergency! My neighbors have been swapped with clones or something. I've locked myself in. {ambient_audio}. Please don't transfer me, just send help!
They're not human anymore! The Johnsons next door, they're... wrong. I'm {caller_name}, I need the police. I'm trapped.

specific_details: they have dead eyes
they speak in perfect unison
they never blink

initial: I'm at {address_location}, apartment 2A. Please hurry!
agitated: I told you, {address_location}! They're right outside!
help_arrived: They're here. I'm at {address_location}.

initial: They look exactly like the real neighbors but they smile wrong. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
agitated: Their eyes are hollow! They mimic the real ones but they slipped up. I saw it!
calming: They're still out there. I can hear them whispering. {ambient_audio}.
help_arrived: I hear sirens. The impostors might run.

initial: Okay, just breathe with me. Help is on the way. Can you lock yourself in a safe room?
agitated: I understand you're scared. Stay quiet and hide. Officers are almost there.
calming: That's good. Keep taking deep breaths. I'm staying on the line.
help_arrived: Officers are here now. Please stay calm and follow their instructions.

initial: I'm terrified! They've been watching me. I don't know how long I can last.
agitated: I'm not crazy! You have to believe me! They're going to replace me too!
calming: I'm trying to stay quiet. I'm in the bathroom with the door locked.
help_arrived: I hear them outside my door. I think it's the police.

initial: Lock your doors and stay away from windows.
agitated: Hide in a room without windows. Barricade the door.
calming: Stay hidden until the officers announce themselves.
help_arrived: The officers will identify themselves. Please comply.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and perform a welfare check. They take the caller to a mental health facility for evaluation.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive but are not equipped for a mental health crisis. They wait for police.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics and a crisis intervention team arrive. They calmly talk to the caller and transport them to the hospital.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is baffled. The caller becomes more agitated, thinking the impostors have sent animals.

DISMISS.message: The dispatcher dismisses the call as a prank. The caller's paranoia escalates, leading to a potentially dangerous confrontation.

title: The Microwave Mind Control
description: A caller believes government agents are using a microwave weapon to control their thoughts and implores the dispatcher to make it stop.
initial_variations: They're in my head! I'm {caller_name}. The government has turned my microwave into a mind control device. Please send someone to disconnect it!
Help! They're broadcasting thoughts into my brain. I can hear them! I've unplugged everything but it's still happening! My name is {caller_name}.
{caller_name} reporting a mind control attack. The authorities are using microwave auditory effect. It's real! {ambient_audio}. I need extraction!
Please, you have to stop the signal! I can't think straight. This is {caller_name}. They're torturing me with thoughts. Make it stop!

specific_details: they're telling me I'm a threat to national security
they're projecting voices of my dead relatives
they're reading my thoughts aloud

initial: I'm at {address_location}, apartment 5G. Can you send someone to stop the broadcast?
describing_delusion: Still at {address_location}. The signal is strong here.
agitated: Why aren't you tracking the signal? I'm at {address_location}! They know where I am!
calmer: Okay, okay. {address_location}. I've moved to the hallway.
help_arrived: I see the officers. {address_location}. Tell them to disable the microwave tower first!

initial: It's the microwave. They've weaponized it. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
describing_delusion: I can hear them clear as day. They're saying 'Subject 7 is non-compliant'. That's me!
agitated: They're getting louder! They're telling me to hurt myself! I won't do it!
calmer: The voices are still there but fainter now that I'm in the hallway. {ambient_audio}.
help_arrived: They're here. I hope they can jam the signal.

initial: Sir, take a deep breath. We're sending someone right now. Can you put the microwave outside your door?
describing_delusion: I understand it's distressing. Help is on the way. Try to move away from the kitchen.
agitated: It's okay. You're not alone. The officers are close. Just focus on my voice.
calmer: You're doing great. Keep away from electronics.
help_arrived: The officers are here to help you. They'll make sure you're safe.

initial: I'm panicking. They've been doing this for weeks. I can't sleep. I'm exhausted.
describing_delusion: I've wrapped my head in tinfoil but it doesn't help. I'm scared they'll make me do something terrible.
agitated: I can't take it anymore! I need them to stop NOW!
calmer: I'm a little better. Just waiting.
help_arrived: I'm ready to let them in.

initial: Stay on the line. I'm dispatching officers. Do not approach the microwave.
describing_delusion: Please remain calm. Lock yourself in a room without electronics if possible.
agitated: I need you to breathe. The officers are two minutes away.
calmer: They're almost there. You'll hear a knock.
help_arrived: They're at your door now. Please open it slowly.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and find the caller in severe distress. They arrange for a psychiatric evaluation.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive but cannot handle the mental health crisis. They await police.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics and a mobile crisis unit arrive. The caller is sedated and taken to the ER for psychiatric care.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is completely irrelevant. The caller becomes hostile, thinking they're government agents in disguise.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a hoax. The caller's condition worsens, leading to a self-harm attempt.

title: Shadow People in the Closet
description: A caller whispers from a closet, claiming shadow people have invaded their home and are searching for them.
initial_variations: {caller_name} here. I'm hiding in my closet. There are shadow people in my house. They're moving things. Please send help quietly!
Please don't say my name out loud. This is {caller_name}. They can hear. Shadow figures are in my living room. {ambient_audio}. I need someone.
I'm {caller_name}. I can't talk loud. There are shadow people in my home. They're tall and silent. Please send police but tell them to be quiet.
Emergency! Shadow creatures are in my house. I'm in the bedroom closet. This is {caller_name}. I can hear them {ambient_audio}.

specific_details: they have no faces
they absorb light
they're standing by my bed

initial: I'm at {address_location}. The closet in the master bedroom.
whispering_in_hiding: Still here, at {address_location}. I can't move.
describing_intruders: Oh god, they're in the hallway. {address_location}, please hurry.
more_frightened: They're trying the doorknob! {address_location}! Send someone NOW!

initial: They're like shadows but solid. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
whispering_in_hiding: There's three of them. They don't speak, just move silently.
describing_intruders: They're going through my drawers. They're not taking anything, just... searching.
more_frightened: One of them is right outside the closet! It's breathing! {ambient_audio}.
police_entering: The officers are calling out. The shadows are fading!

initial: I'm terrified. I grabbed my phone and ran when I saw them.
whispering_in_hiding: I'm shaking. I've been here for ten minutes. They don't know I'm here.
describing_intruders: I'm peeking through the slats. Oh no, one just looked toward the closet.
more_frightened: I'm not breathing. It's right outside. Oh god, it knows.

initial: Stay as quiet as possible. Do not make any noise. Police are on their way.
whispering_in_hiding: Good job staying hidden. Put your phone on mute unless you need to speak.
describing_intruders: Keep watching but don't react. Help is close.
more_frightened: Don't move. Stay completely still. They can't get in if the door is shut.
police_entering: The police are inside now. Let them clear the house before you come out.

initial: No weapons. They just appeared out of nowhere.
whispering_in_hiding: They haven't said anything. I don't think they're armed.
describing_intruders: They're just moving slowly. It's like they're looking for me.
more_frightened: It's trying to open the door! I think it has claws!
police_entering: I think the officers scared them off.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police perform a sweep of the house finding no intruders. They locate the caller in the closet and provide crisis referral.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive and conduct a search, but are ill-equipped to handle the psychological situation.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive with police. The caller is treated for extreme anxiety and taken for psychiatric evaluation.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control's arrival confuses the caller, who thinks animal control are the shadow people materializing.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed. The caller remains hiding for hours and develops severe trauma.

title: The Bugged Apartment Bugout
description: A paranoid caller claims their apartment is bugged by a secret organization and urgently requests extraction before they are kidnapped.
initial_variations: {caller_name} calling. My apartment is compromised. They've bugged everything. I need extraction now. I can't talk long, they're listening.
This is {caller_name}. I've uncovered a conspiracy. My apartment is surveilled 24/7. I need a team to get me out. {ambient_audio}.
Code Red! This is {caller_name}. The Order has planted listening devices in my walls. I'm packing a bugout bag. Send police but make sure they aren't compromised.
They're watching me. I'm {caller_name}. I need a safe house. My apartment is full of cameras and mics. Please send someone trustworthy. {ambient_audio}.

specific_details: they know my every move
they've been following me for weeks
I have evidence on a USB

initial: I'm at {address_location}, top floor. But they might be tracking this call.
explaining_surveillance: Still at {address_location}. I'm in the bathroom where the signal is weakest.
frantic_packing: I'm not safe here! {address_location}. Please, they could raid any minute!
hidden_and_waiting: I'm hidden in the stairwell now. {address_location}. Send the extraction team.
rescue_team_arrived: I see them! {address_location}. Tell them not to use the main entrance.

initial: It's the Illuminati, or maybe a rogue agency. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
explaining_surveillance: Their bugs are in the light fixtures, behind the mirrors. They listen to everything.
frantic_packing: They know I'm onto them. That's why they're coming. I can hear their chatter in my teeth fillings.
hidden_and_waiting: I'm in the emergency exit. I think I lost their trail. {ambient_audio}.
rescue_team_arrived: The officers are here. I hope they're clean.

initial: I have recordings! I can play them for you. They're saying my name, {caller_name}, over and over.
explaining_surveillance: I took photos of the bugs. They're small, like dots. I'll show you when you arrive.
frantic_packing: The evidence is in my bag. I can't lose it. They'll kill me for it.
hidden_and_waiting: I still have the USB. It's in my pocket.
rescue_team_arrived: I'll give it to the officers if they're real.

initial: Okay, stay calm. Let's plan a safe way out. Can you exit through a back door?
explaining_surveillance: I need you to pack a bag quietly. No sudden movements. Then hide.
frantic_packing: Good, you're packed. Now get out of the apartment. Use the stairs.
hidden_and_waiting: Stay hidden. The team is almost there. Don't come out until they identify themselves.
rescue_team_arrived: The officers are going to secure the building. Stay where you are.

initial: They're outside my door! I can hear them talking in code.
explaining_surveillance: They have guns, maybe. They've been tracking me for months.
frantic_packing: They're about to break in! I have to go now!
hidden_and_waiting: I don't hear them anymore. Maybe I lost them.
rescue_team_arrived: I see red dots on my chest! No, it's just the officers' lasers.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and find no surveillance devices. The caller is taken to a hospital for psychiatric evaluation.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive but cannot address the caller's psychological distress. They wait for police.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: A crisis team and paramedics arrive. The caller is safely transported to a mental health facility.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is completely out of place. The caller thinks they are agents sent to silence them.

DISMISS.message: The dispatcher dismisses the call. The caller, feeling abandoned, attempts to flee and gets injured.

title: Voices Telling Me to End It
description: A caller hears auditory hallucinations commanding them to commit suicide and frantically asks for help to resist.
initial_variations: I need help! I'm {caller_name}. The voices are telling me to kill myself. I don't want to do it but they're so loud! Please send someone.
{caller_name} calling. They're screaming in my head, saying I should jump. I'm on my balcony, but I don't want to die. Help me.
This is an emergency! The voices won't stop. They're telling me to end it all. I'm {caller_name}. I'm so tired of fighting them. {ambient_audio}.
Please, you have to talk to me. The voices are winning. I'm {caller_name}. I have pills, but I called instead. I need to be stopped.

specific_details: they say I'm worthless
they're counting down from ten
they want me to use a knife

initial: I'm at {address_location}, apartment 12B. I'm on the balcony.
expressing_urges: I'm still here, at {address_location}. I haven't jumped yet.
resisting: I moved inside. I'm at {address_location}, in the living room.
calmer_with_support: I'm sitting on the floor. {address_location}. I'm trying to block them out.
professionals_on_scene: They're at the door. {address_location}. I'll let them in.

initial: {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}. It's like they're real people yelling at me.
expressing_urges: They're saying 'do it, do it' over and over. It's unbearable.
resisting: I put the pills down. But they're still there, telling me I'm weak.
calmer_with_support: They're fading a little. Your voice helps. {ambient_audio}.
professionals_on_scene: They're here. The voices are scared. They're quiet now.

initial: Hey, listen to my voice. You called because you want to live. Focus on that. Breathe with me.
expressing_urges: You're incredibly strong for reaching out. The voices aren't you. You don't have to obey them.
resisting: Good job putting the pills away. Keep talking to me. What's your favorite memory?
calmer_with_support: You're doing great. Help is almost there. You're not alone.
professionals_on_scene: The paramedics are here to help you. They understand what you're going through.

initial: I have a knife in the kitchen. They want me to use it. I'm trying to stay away.
expressing_urges: I took three steps toward the railing before I dialed. I'm scared I'll do it.
resisting: I threw the knife out the window. But I feel like I'm losing.
calmer_with_support: I don't feel like doing it right now. But the voices are still there.
professionals_on_scene: I'm safe now. The paramedics are taking me.

initial: You did the right thing calling. We're going to get you help. I'm staying on the line.
expressing_urges: Please keep talking to me. I care about what happens to you. You matter.
resisting: You are not your thoughts. Those voices are lying to you. You have a future.
calmer_with_support: I'm proud of you for holding on. The ambulance is two minutes out.
professionals_on_scene: You're safe now. Let them take care of you.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and use crisis intervention training to de-escalate. The caller is taken for involuntary psychiatric hold.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive but lack psychiatric training. They secure the scene until medical arrives.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive swiftly. The caller is immediately assessed and transported to a psychiatric emergency room.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control's arrival triggers the caller, who believes the voices have sent monsters. The situation escalates.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as attention-seeking. The caller, feeling abandoned, attempts suicide minutes later.

title: The Shadow Stalker
description: Caller reports a shadowy entity that has been stalking them for weeks and is now attempting to break into their home, causing extreme terror.
initial_variations: Hello? I'm {caller_name}, I need help! There's something outside my door! It's been following me for weeks... a shadow person. It's trying to get in!
This is {caller_name}. It's here again! The shadow thing... I can hear {ambient_audio} outside. Please send someone!
Oh God, oh God, it's at my window! I'm {caller_name}, I'm hiding in the closet. It's going to kill me!
I'm {caller_name} and there's a creature... it's not human... it's a shadow that moves on its own. It's been stalking me, and now it's scratching at my front door!

specific_details: its eyes are like glowing red coals
it whispers my name over and over
I saw it phase through the wall last week

initial: I'm at {address_location}. It's right outside, I can hear {ambient_audio}.
My address is {address_location}. Hurry, please!
heightened_terror: Still at {address_location}! It's trying the back door now!
{address_location} — I'm in the {hiding_place} and it's inside the house!
police_contact: I see the police lights! They're outside {address_location}.
They're at {address_location}! Tell them to be careful, the shadow might attack them!
safe: We're at {address_location}. They got me out. I'm with the police now.
I'm safe at {address_location}. Thank you.

initial: It's a shadow, but solid somehow. {specific_details}. I've been seeing it for weeks.
It started two weeks ago, just following me home. Now it wants to get in. {specific_details}.
heightened_terror: I can't see it clearly, but it's tall and moves like smoke. {specific_details}. I'm so scared!
It's in the hallway! I saw {specific_details}. It's not human!
police_contact: The police are here. They're shining lights but the shadow is gone. It vanished when they arrived.
They're checking the house. I don't see it anymore. Maybe the light drove it away.
safe: I told the officers everything. They said I'm safe now. They think I was just imagining it, but I know what I saw.
They're going to search the neighborhood. I'm okay now, but I'm still shaking.

initial: I'm terrified. My heart is pounding. I don't know if I can hold on.
I'm hiding in the {hiding_place}. I'm shaking, please don't let it get me.
heightened_terror: It's getting louder! I think it knows I'm on the phone! Oh God, it's trying the door handle!
I'm hyperventilating. I can't breathe. Please, please hurry!
police_contact: I see the police! Oh thank God. I'm still in the {hiding_place}, waiting for them.
They're outside. I'm going to stay hidden until they call me.
safe: I'm okay now. The police are with me. I'm just really shaken up.
I'm safe. They're talking to me. I think I need a doctor.

initial: You believe me? Thank you! Just stay on the line, please.
Okay, I'm trying to stay calm. I hear sirens in the distance.
heightened_terror: I'm trying to breathe slowly. I think I hear sirens. Are they coming?
Okay, okay. I'll hide and not make a sound. Please hurry.
police_contact: I see the police! They're at the front door. I'm going to let them in.
They're here. I'm safe. Thank you for staying on the line.
safe: Thank you so much. I'm with the officers now. They're helpful.
You saved me. I don't know what would have happened.

initial: No, I don't have any weapons. I'm just trying to hide.
I have a baseball bat, but I don't think it'll help against a shadow.
heightened_terror: I grabbed a kitchen knife, but I don't want to use it! I'm scared it might get me.
Just my phone. Please don't make me confront it!
police_contact: I won't arm myself. The police are here, they can handle it.
No, I'm safe now. The officers will protect me.
safe: I'm not armed. The police took my knife just in case.
I'm calm now. No weapons.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and conduct a thorough search, finding no intruder but the caller is visibly distressed. They provide a police escort to the hospital for evaluation.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond and check the premises for structural anomalies but find nothing. They hand over to police for a welfare check.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics and a crisis intervention team arrive. They gently coax the caller out of hiding and transport them for psychiatric evaluation.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives expecting an animal complaint. The caller becomes more agitated, and valuable time is lost before proper units are dispatched.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a prank. The caller, left without help, suffers a severe panic attack and later requires emergency intervention.

title: The Mind Readers
description: Caller is paranoid that neighbors are using advanced technology to read their thoughts and broadcast them publicly, leading to extreme anxiety and potential breakdown.
initial_variations: Help! I'm {caller_name} and my neighbors are reading my mind! They have a machine and they're broadcasting my thoughts to everyone!
This is {caller_name}, you have to help me. They're listening to my brainwaves and I can't make it stop! It's {neighbor_description}.
They're in my head! I can hear static {ambient_audio} whenever they tune in. I'm {caller_name}, please, send someone!
I'm {caller_name}. I've been tormented for months. Every thought I have, they know it and they spread it. They're ruining my life!

specific_details: they use a modified satellite dish pointed at my bedroom
I can hear my own voice on the radio reading my thoughts
they post my thoughts on the internet in real time
neighbor_description: the man in the apartment above me
the new tenants who moved in last month

initial: I'm at {address_location}. They're right next to me, so they can hear me now.
{address_location}. They're monitoring me from their apartment.
paranoid_accusation: At {address_location}, where else! They're probably listening to this call!
I told you, {address_location}. Send someone fast before they realize I called.
distrustful_of_dispatcher: Why do you keep asking? Are you one of them? {address_location}, but don't send them a warning!
{address_location}. If you're setting me up, I'll know.
resolution: I'm at {address_location}. The police are here. They're talking to the neighbors.
I'm okay now, at {address_location}. They're taking me to talk to someone.

initial: It's a device, I've seen it. {specific_details}. I can't even think privately anymore.
They've been doing it for three months. {specific_details}. It's driving me insane.
paranoid_accusation: They're getting bolder. Now they even comment on my thoughts out loud. {specific_details}.
I have proof! {specific_details}. I recorded it, but they deleted the file!
distrustful_of_dispatcher: Why do you need details? So you can give them to the mind readers? Fine. {specific_details}. There, now they know I told you.
It's a conspiracy. {specific_details}. I bet you already knew that.
resolution: The police checked the apartment. They didn't find anything, but I know they hid it. At least they're looking into it.
The officers say there's no device, but they're taking me to get help. I'm still not sure.

initial: I'm on edge. Every sound makes me jump. I can barely function.
I haven't slept in days. They won't let me. They keep broadcasting at night.
paranoid_accusation: I'm ready to confront them myself if you won't help! I have nothing left to lose!
I'm armed with a baseball bat. If they try anything, I'll defend myself.
distrustful_of_dispatcher: How do I know you're actually sending help? This could be a trap.
I'm not answering that. It's for your mind-reading bosses.
resolution: I'm calming down now that the police are here. I just want this to stop.
I feel a bit better, but I'm still scared. They said they'll check on me.

initial: You believe me? Thank you. Most people don't. Please just make them stop.
Okay, I'll try to stay calm. I hear sirens... are those for me?
paranoid_accusation: You really think help is coming? I want to believe you. I'll wait a few more minutes.
Alright, I'll put the bat down. But if they come to my door, I'm not responsible.
distrustful_of_dispatcher: You sound sincere. Maybe I misjudged you. I'll wait for the officers.
Fine, I'll trust you. Just don't betray me.
resolution: Thank you for listening. The police are here. They're not arresting me, just talking.
You stayed on the line. That means a lot. I'm safe now.

initial: No, but I'm thinking about it. I feel so defenseless.
I have a kitchen knife nearby, just in case they try to break in.
paranoid_accusation: I have a bat, and I'm not afraid to use it if they come for me!
I'm not a threat unless they make me one. I just want privacy.
distrustful_of_dispatcher: Why, so you can tell them I'm armed? No comment.
I'll handle my own protection, thank you.
resolution: I put the bat away. The police are here, I don't need it.
I'm not armed now. They're taking me to a hospital, I think.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and de-escalate the situation. They perform a welfare check and facilitate a voluntary psychiatric evaluation for the caller.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond but have no jurisdiction over the mental health crisis. They stand by until police transfer the caller for medical care.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: A Crisis Intervention Team (CIT) officer and paramedics arrive, build rapport, and convince the caller to accept transport to a mental health facility for stabilization.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is sent, causing the caller to believe the dispatcher is part of the conspiracy. The caller barricades themselves inside and refuses further help.

DISMISS.message: The call is laughed off as crazy. Hours later, the caller attempts to confront the neighbors with a weapon, resulting in a tense police standoff.

title: The Doppelgänger
description: Caller is convinced that their family members have been replaced by exact duplicates and is holding a knife to defend themselves, creating a dangerous hostage-like situation.
initial_variations: Help, they're not my family! I'm {caller_name}, and my {victim_relation} has been replaced by a clone! I'm holding a knife to keep myself safe.
I'm {caller_name}. You have to listen to me. The people in my house are impostors. They look like my family but they're not. I have a weapon.
This is {caller_name}. I've locked myself in the bedroom with a knife. The thing pretending to be my {victim_relation} is outside the door. Please send police!
My family is gone! They took them and put these... these copies in their place. I'm {caller_name}. I don't know what they want. I'm scared.

specific_details: their eyes are the wrong color, and they don't blink
they mimic my family's voices but the tone is off
I saw one of them's skin ripple like it's made of latex

initial: At {address_location}. I'm in the back bedroom. They're in the living room.
{address_location}. I locked myself in the bathroom. They're trying to talk to me through the door.
standoff: Still at {address_location}! They're trying to get in! I warned them!
I'm not coming out until the police arrive at {address_location}!
police_intervention: I hear sirens outside {address_location}. Tell them to be careful, the duplicates might attack.
The police are at {address_location}. I can see them through the window.
safe: I'm at {address_location}. The police got me out safely. They're dealing with the impostors.
I'm safe at {address_location}. They're taking me somewhere to talk.

initial: They look exactly like my {victim_relation}, but {specific_details}. I knew something was wrong instantly.
It started yesterday when I noticed {specific_details}. They've been acting strange ever since.
standoff: Listen to them! {ambient_audio}. They're trying to trick me. But I can see {specific_details}!
They keep saying they love me, but I know the truth. {specific_details}. They're not human!
police_intervention: I can see the officers. The duplicates are backing away. They know they've been caught.
Police are telling me to drop the knife, but what about the impostors?
safe: The police separated us. They're questioning the... people. I still don't trust them.
They said my family is real, but I need help. I'm so confused.

initial: I'm terrified, but I'm protecting myself. I won't let them take me.
I'm holding a kitchen knife. I'm not letting anyone near me.
standoff: They're getting closer! I'm warning you, I'll defend myself if they break in!
I'm sweating, my hands are shaking. I might have to... I don't know.
police_intervention: I see the police. I'll wait for them to come in. I'm not dropping the knife until they're in control.
Officers are outside. I think I can trust them.
safe: I surrendered the knife. I'm with the officers. I'm still shaken.
I'm okay now. They're getting me some water.

initial: Thank you for believing me. I'll wait for the police.
Okay, I'm trying to stay calm. I hear sirens.
standoff: Really? They're almost here? I'll hold off. But if they try anything...
You promise they'll help? I'll give them a chance.
police_intervention: I see them! I'm going to unlock the door and come out slowly.
Okay, I'm putting my hands up. They're at the window.
safe: You stayed with me. Thank you. I think I need a doctor.
I'm safe. It's over.

initial: No, I'm alone in here. The impostors are outside. They haven't gotten in yet.
I'm the only one in this room. No one else.
standoff: They're trying to get in, but I'm by myself. I won't let them take me hostage.
No hostages, just me. But they're out there.
police_intervention: The police are here, so there's no danger of hostages now.
No, I'm the only one in here. I'm coming out.
safe: No, everyone's safe. I'm with the police now.
Nobody was hurt.

SEND_POLICE.message: A tactical unit and negotiator arrive. They establish communication, convince the caller to put down the knife, and safely resolve the situation. The caller is taken for evaluation.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond but are not equipped for a potential hostage situation. They stage nearby until police secure the scene, causing a slight delay.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: A mobile crisis team and paramedics coordinate with police to safely disarm the caller and provide immediate psychiatric care, avoiding use of force.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives to a domestic dispute, startling the caller who then barricades themselves further, escalating the situation.

DISMISS.message: Dismissing the call leads to a violent confrontation when the caller, feeling abandoned, attacks a family member they believe is an impostor, resulting in serious injury.

title: The End of the World
description: Caller is experiencing apocalyptic delusions in a public park, claiming to see demons and the end of days, causing public alarm and potential self-harm risk.
initial_variations: It's happening! I'm {caller_name}, and the end is here! Demons are crawling out of the ground! The sky is turning red! Everyone needs to hide!
This is {caller_name}. I'm in the park and I see them! {ambient_audio} — can you hear the screams? Send everyone!
Help! I'm {caller_name}, and I'm not crazy! The apocalypse is starting! I'm at the park, and there are creatures everywhere!
Please, you have to warn the city. I'm {caller_name}, and I'm witnessing the end of the world. Demons, fire, it's all happening!

address_location: Central Park near the Bethesda Fountain
Riverside Park by the boat basin
specific_details: the sky is blood red and there are cracks in the air
I see winged creatures with horns swooping down
the ground is opening up and hands are reaching out
ambient_audio: a low rumble like an earthquake

initial: I'm at {address_location}, {public_location_detail}. You have to see this!
It's {address_location}. I'm standing right where the portal is opening.
public_disturbance: Still here! There are more of them now! {address_location} is ground zero!
I'm not moving! Someone has to witness this! {address_location}!
police_approach: I see a police car approaching {address_location}. Tell them to be careful!
They're coming into the park at {address_location}. I'll wave them over.
calmed: I'm at {address_location}. The officers are here. They're trying to calm me down.
We're leaving the park at {address_location}. They're taking me to get checked out.

initial: You have to believe me! {specific_details}. It's the apocalypse!
I was sitting on a bench and then {specific_details}. Everyone is running, but they can't see it like I can.
public_disturbance: People think I'm crazy, but I see {specific_details}. The demons are targeting the non-believers!
Listen! {ambient_audio}. That's the sound of the end! I'm trying to warn people but they won't listen.
police_approach: The police are here. They're looking around. The demons are fading, but I know they're still there.
The officers are telling me to get down. I'm trying to show them the cracks in the sky.
calmed: They say there's nothing there, but I know what I saw. Maybe it was a vision.
I'm sorry for causing a scene. I really thought... I need help.

initial: I'm in awe and terror. I've never felt so alive and so scared.
My heart is racing. I'm standing, pointing at the sky. People are staring.
public_disturbance: I'm shouting warnings! They don't see the danger! I might have to run, the demons are getting closer!
I can't leave people to die without a warning. I'm staying right here, no matter what.
police_approach: I'm cooperating. I'm trying to stay calm, but the sky is still red.
I'm a little tired from shouting. I'll sit down.
calmed: I'm better now. The officers are talking to me. It's starting to feel less real.
I'm embarrassed. I think I had a breakdown.

initial: You believe me? Thank you. Most people don't. I'll stay calm until help arrives.
Okay, I'll try to keep it together. I see a police car in the distance.
public_disturbance: They're really coming? I thought they'd ignore me. I'll point them to where the portal is.
Alright, I'll stop shouting. I'll wait for the officers.
police_approach: They're coming towards me. I'll raise my hands and show I'm not a threat.
The police are here. I feel safer now.
calmed: Thank you for listening. I don't know what came over me.
You helped me through this. I'm going to get help.

initial: No, I'm fine. They haven't touched me yet.
I'm not injured, just scared.
public_disturbance: My throat is sore from shouting, but otherwise I'm okay.
I tripped earlier, but I'm not hurt.
police_approach: Maybe a bit dehydrated, but I'm fine.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and calmly de-escalate the situation. They take the caller into protective custody and transport them to a hospital for evaluation.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond and assist with crowd control. They provide water to the agitated caller but hand over to police for the mental health intervention.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: A mobile crisis unit arrives, quickly builds a rapport, and convinces the caller to voluntarily accept transport to a psychiatric facility for stabilization.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives, frightening the caller who thinks they are demons. The caller runs into traffic, nearly getting hit.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a prank. The caller continues to disturb the public until they are arrested for disorderly conduct after a physical struggle.

title: The Poisoned Food
description: Caller is emaciated and weak, having not eaten for days due to the delusion that all food is contaminated. They need medical intervention and psychiatric help.
initial_variations: I need an ambulance. I'm {caller_name}, and I can't eat anything. They've poisoned all my food. I haven't had a meal in days.
Help me, please. I'm {caller_name}. I'm so weak. Every time I try to eat, I feel like I'm being watched. The food tastes wrong. I can't do it anymore.
This is {caller_name}. I'm starving, but I can't trust any food. I think I'm dying. Please send someone.
I'm {caller_name}. I've been surviving on tap water for {last_meal} because I know they've tampered with everything else. I need help.

specific_details: I saw a man in a hazmat suit outside my apartment the day this started
the food sparkles like it has metal shavings in it
every time I open a can, there's a strange chemical smell

initial: I'm at {address_location}. Please hurry, I feel like I might pass out.
{address_location}. I'm in my kitchen, but there's nothing I can eat.
weakened: Still here... {address_location}. I can't even get up now.
trusting: I hear sirens. They're coming to {address_location}, right?
Thank you. I'll unlock the door at {address_location}.
help_arrived: They're here at {address_location}. Paramedics are checking me.
I'm at {address_location}. They're giving me fluids.

initial: It started last week. {specific_details}. Since then, I can't bring myself to eat. I'm terrified of being poisoned.
I know it sounds crazy, but {specific_details}. Every time I try to eat, {ambient_audio}.
weakened: I'm so tired... can't think straight. But I know {specific_details}. Please believe me.
I see things... shadows by the fridge. They're the ones doing it. {specific_details}.
trusting: I'll try to explain when they get here. {specific_details}. It's all connected.
Maybe they can test my food. {specific_details}. Then you'll see.
help_arrived: The paramedics are looking around. I'm telling them {specific_details}.
They're not judging me. They say it's okay. I still see {specific_details}.

initial: I'm dizzy and weak. I haven't eaten in {last_meal}. I can barely stand.
My hands are shaking. I think my blood sugar is low.
weakened: I'm lying down now. I can't get up. It's getting harder to breathe.
I might pass out. Please, I need help now.
trusting: I'm trying to stay awake. I can hear sirens. I'm holding on.
I'm a little better now that I know help is coming. Still weak.
help_arrived: They're checking my vitals. I'm so relieved they're here.
I'm still weak, but they're giving me glucose.

initial: Thank you. I've been so alone. I'll try to stay calm.
You sound kind. Please don't let me die.
weakened: Okay, I'm trying to breathe slowly. I trust you.
I'll hold on a little longer. The sirens are getting louder.
trusting: They're at the door. I'm going to let them in.
Thank you for staying with me. I was so scared.
help_arrived: You saved me. They're taking me to the hospital.
I'm going to be okay. Thank you.

initial: I had a small piece of bread {last_meal} ago, but I forced myself to vomit it up because I was sure it was tainted.
Just water for {last_meal}. I can't risk eating anything solid.
weakened: Nothing... it's been {last_meal} since I ate anything significant.
I tried to eat an apple yesterday, but I panicked after one bite.
trusting: I can't remember exactly. It feels like weeks.
I lost count. I've been so focused on not eating.
help_arrived: The paramedics are asking me that. They're concerned about refeeding syndrome.
I don't know. They're giving me an IV now.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and force entry, finding the caller unconscious. They administer first aid until paramedics arrive and transport to the hospital.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond and break down the door. They provide initial medical care but need to wait for paramedics for advanced support.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive, stabilize the caller with IV fluids and transport them to the ER. A psychiatric consult is called for the delusions.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives, does not have the equipment or training to handle a medical emergency, and wastes precious time before medical help is summoned.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a hypochondriac. Hours later, the caller is found by a neighbor in a state of severe malnutrition and dehydration, requiring ICU admission.
